body.en: Time to turn your plan into a real app! In this lesson, Claude will create the **file structure** — the skeleton of your app. Think of it like building the frame of a house before adding walls and furniture.
body.zh: 是时候把计划变成真正的应用了！这节课Claude会创建**文件结构**——应用的骨架。就像盖房子先建框架再加墙壁和家具。

title.en: What Files Does an App Need?
title.zh: 一个应用需要什么文件？

body.en:
A basic web app needs just three types of files:

- **HTML** (.html) — the structure (what's on the page)
- **CSS** (.css) — the style (how it looks)
- **JavaScript** (.js) — the behavior (what it does)

Claude will create all of these for you based on your CLAUDE.md plan.
body.zh:
一个基本的Web应用只需要三种文件：

- **HTML** (.html) —— 结构（页面上有什么）
- **CSS** (.css) —— 样式（看起来怎样）
- **JavaScript** (.js) —— 行为（做什么）

Claude会根据你的CLAUDE.md计划创建这些。

title.en: Try It: Ask Claude to Build the Structure

body.en: Tell Claude to create the basic file structure for your task tracker.
body.zh: 让Claude为你的任务管理器创建基础文件结构。

expectedCommands.command: claude "create the basic file structure for a task tracker app"
expectedCommands.output:
I'll set up the project structure based on your CLAUDE.md.

✓ Created index.html — main page with task list UI
✓ Created style.css — clean, modern styling
✓ Created app.js — task management logic

Your app structure is ready! Open index.html to see it.
expectedCommands.successMsg: The skeleton is built! Claude created your entire app structure.

hints.en: Type: claude "create the basic file structure for a task tracker app"
hints.zh: 输入：claude "create the basic file structure for a task tracker app"

body.en:
Claude created an HTML file with:

- An **input field** where users type task names
- An **"Add" button** to add new tasks
- A **task list** area where tasks appear
- Links to your CSS and JavaScript files

You already know HTML tags from Lesson 5 — can you picture what the code looks like?
body.zh:
Claude创建了一个HTML文件，包含：

- 用户输入任务名的**输入框**
- **「添加」按钮**用于添加新任务
- 显示任务的**任务列表**区域
- 链接到CSS和JavaScript文件

你在第5课已经学了HTML标签——能想象代码是什么样吗？

body.en:
The CSS file controls **how things look**:

- Colors, fonts, and sizes
- Spacing between elements
- How things change on mobile phones

CSS is like the **interior design** of your app. Claude writes it for you, but knowing it exists helps you ask for better changes.
body.zh:
CSS文件控制**东西的外观**：

- 颜色、字体和大小
- 元素之间的间距
- 手机上的显示效果

CSS就像应用的**室内设计**。Claude帮你写，但知道它的存在能帮你更好地提出修改要求。

body.en:
JavaScript is the **behavior** — it makes things happen when users interact:

- When you click "Add", JavaScript adds a task to the list
- When you click a checkbox, JavaScript marks it complete
- When you reload the page, JavaScript loads your saved tasks

You don't need to write JavaScript — that's Claude's job. But knowing what it does helps you debug and iterate.
body.zh:
JavaScript是**行为**——用户交互时让事情发生：

- 点「添加」时，JavaScript把任务加到列表
- 点复选框时，JavaScript标记任务完成
- 重新加载页面时，JavaScript加载保存的任务

你不需要写JavaScript——那是Claude的工作。但知道它做什么有助于你调试和改进。

body.en:
You now have a basic app with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. If you open index.html in your browser, you should see the beginning of your task tracker.

In the next lesson, we'll make it **interactive** — buttons that work, tasks that save. The app is about to come alive!
body.zh:
你现在有了包含HTML、CSS和JavaScript文件的基础应用。在浏览器打开index.html，你应该能看到任务管理器的雏形。

下一课我们让它**可交互**——按钮能用、任务能保存。应用即将活起来！
